title: Navy Blue Gold Wrapping Paper Roll - 43cm x 10m - Navy Blue Matte Kraft Wrap Paper with Gold and Silver Foil Design Gift Wrapping Paper for Birthday, Wedding, Party, Christmas, New Year
features: 【Classic and Unique Design】: The navy blue gold wrapping paper is designed by solid navy blue matte kraft paper with gold and silver foil dotted, it will make your gift wrap shiny, classic, special. The gift wrapping paper with back grid lines designed for easy cuts.

【Ideal Size】: The navy blue wrapping paper roll measures (Width)43cm x (Length)10m each roll, suitable for most small and medium gifts wrapping, please consider whether it fits your gift size before you choose it.

【High Quality Wrapping Paper】: The birthday wrapping paper roll is made of premium quality smooth kraft paper, which is easy to fold and pack. With great packing to protect blue wrapping paper roll from scratches and prevent dust, no crease and easy storage.

【Wide Applications】: The navy blue wrapping paper is perfect for gifts wrapping of birthday, wedding, Christmas, New Year, Valentine's Day, party etc. Also great for craft project, bouquet wrap, room decoration, background paper, book cover, envelopes or other item wrapping.
【Package Include】: You will get 1 roll navy blue and gold wrapping paper, (Width)43cm x (Length)10m / 17inch x 394inch.
